name: Tatuaje Arsenal Robusto
description: The Tatuaje Arsenal Robusto is a robust Nicaraguan puro wrapped in a dark Habano leaf, delivering classic Pete Johnson complexity — peppery strength balanced with cedar and leather from start to finish.

name: Tatuaje Arsenal Toro
description: The Arsenal Toro allows Pete Johnson's signature Nicaraguan blend extra time to develop, building layers of dark chocolate and leather with a spicy Habano wrapper character.

name: Tatuaje Noches de Paris Robusto
description: Noches de Paris is Tatuaje's maduro line featuring a silky dark San Andrés wrapper over a Nicaraguan core — rich with dark chocolate, dried fruit, and espresso character.

name: Tatuaje Coronado Robusto
description: The Tatuaje Coronado is a mellower Connecticut-wrapped expression from Pete Johnson, offering creamy almond and cedar notes that showcase the smoothness of an Ecuadorian shade wrapper over Nicaraguan tobacco.

name: Tatuaje Unicos No. 1
description: Tatuaje Unicos No. 1 is a long elegant smoke featuring a Nicaraguan Corojo wrapper that delivers espresso and dark chocolate complexity, regarded as one of Pete Johnson's most distinguished long-format expressions.

name: Tatuaje Fausto Short Robusto
description: The Fausto Short Robusto packs concentrated flavor into a quick smoke — the San Andrés wrapper brings rich dark chocolate and coffee notes with earthy pepper right from the first light.

name: Tatuaje Fausto Toro
description: The Tatuaje Fausto Toro is the flagship format of this San Andrés-wrapped line from Pete Johnson, earning wide critical acclaim for its rich dark-chocolate espresso character and full, satisfying body.

name: Tatuaje Petit Cazadores
description: The Petit Cazadores is a slender, shorter Tatuaje expression with the brand's characteristic Nicaraguan Habano profile — spicy and leathery with a quick cedar finish perfect for a brief session.

name: Tatuaje Tattoo Maduro Robusto
description: Part of Tatuaje's accessible Tattoo line in maduro, this robusto sports a dark oily San Andrés wrapper and delivers rich chocolate and molasses sweetness over an earthy Nicaraguan core.

name: Tatuaje XL Robusto
description: The Tatuaje XL Robusto extends the traditional robusto format with extra ring gauge, giving Pete Johnson's Ecuadorian Habano-wrapped Nicaraguan blend a fuller, rounder smoke with cedar and leathery strength.

name: Kristoff GC Corojo Robusto
description: The Kristoff GC Corojo Robusto uses a rich Honduran Corojo wrapper over a Jamastran Valley blend, delivering medium-full spice and leather with earthy cedar notes — a solid value in the Kristoff portfolio.

name: Kristoff Ligero Habano Toro
description: Kristoff's Ligero Habano Toro features an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper over a full ligero-forward Honduran core, producing a bold, peppery smoke with leather and cedar complexity throughout.

name: Kristoff Shade Grown Toro
description: The Kristoff Shade Grown Toro is the brand's accessible mild offering, featuring a silky Ecuadorian Connecticut shade wrapper over Honduran tobaccos for a smooth, creamy smoke with almond and cedar notes.

name: Kristoff Original Corojo Robusto
description: The original cornerstone of the Kristoff line, the Original Corojo Robusto pairs a Corojo 99 seed wrapper with a balanced Honduran-Nicaraguan blend for a smooth medium to medium-full smoke.

name: Kristoff Uva Robusto
description: The Kristoff Uva (Spanish for grape) Robusto features a reddish Colorado Habano wrapper from Honduras that imparts a subtle fruity plum sweetness over spiced cedar and leather.

name: Kristoff Pistoff Kristoff Toro
description: Pistoff Kristoff Toro is the brand's full-bodied powerhouse — a maduro-wrapped ligero bomb delivering dark chocolate, black pepper, and espresso intensity that lives up to its provocative name.

name: Ezra Zion Tantrum Toro
description: The Ezra Zion Tantrum Toro extends the boutique Texas brand's signature Habano-wrapped blend into the toro format, delivering a satisfying medium-full smoke of leather, cedar, and dark chocolate.

name: Ezra Zion FHK Toro
description: The Ezra Zion FHK Toro features a Honduran Habano wrapper over a complex Honduran-Nicaraguan blend, producing a medium-full smoke with peppery leather and cedar notes backed by earthy complexity.

name: Ezra Zion Possession Robusto
description: Ezra Zion Possession Robusto is a Nicaraguan puro expression from this Texas boutique brand, showcasing Estelí-grown Habano tobacco with classic pepper, leather, and dark chocolate notes.

name: Ezra Zion Section 1 Robusto
description: Ezra Zion's Section 1 Robusto is the brand's smoother Connecticut-wrapped offering from the Jamastran Valley, providing creamy vanilla and almond character over cedar — approachable yet crafted with boutique care.

name: Ezra Zion Inception Robusto
description: The Ezra Zion Inception Robusto was one of the brand's first releases, establishing their style with a Honduran Corojo wrapper and a balanced blend of cedar, spice, and cocoa at medium-full strength.

name: Ezra Zion Collaboration Robusto
description: The Ezra Zion Collaboration Robusto blends tobaccos from three countries under an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper, resulting in a nuanced medium-full smoke with cedar, cocoa, and dried fruit complexity — a showcase of Ezra Zion's cross-border blending.

name: HVC First Selection Toro
description: HVC First Selection Toro from Hamlet Paredes showcases an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper over an all-Nicaraguan core, delivering medium-full leather, pepper, and cedar in a beautifully constructed format.

name: HVC Serie B Robusto
description: The HVC Serie B Robusto is a maduro offering from Hamlet Paredes featuring a Connecticut broadleaf wrapper for dark chocolate and coffee notes over a medium-full Nicaraguan core.

name: HVC Black Friday Toro
description: HVC Black Friday Toro is a full-bodied, ligero-forward Nicaraguan with a dark San Andrés maduro wrapper — an intense expression of dark chocolate, espresso, and black pepper that earns its ominous name.

name: HVC San Isidro Robusto
description: The HVC San Isidro Robusto uses a Nicaraguan Criollo wrapper over an Estelí core for a medium-strength smoke with woody cedar and coffee spice — an accessible entry point into Hamlet Paredes's craft.

name: HVC 500 Años Robusto
description: HVC 500 Años Robusto commemorates 500 years of tobacco cultivation with an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper over prime Jalapa and Estelí fillers — complex and full-bodied with cedar, pepper, and leather character.

name: Ferio Tego Timeless Sterling Toro
description: The Ferio Tego Timeless Sterling Toro, from Lew Rothman and Gary Hyams, extends the Sterling line's Connecticut-wrapped Dominican blend into the toro format — a smooth, creamy smoke with cedar and vanilla refinement.

name: Ferio Tego Generosidad Robusto
description: Ferio Tego Generosidad Robusto pairs an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper with Dominican and Nicaraguan fillers for a medium-full expression of cedar, leather, and pepper that reflects Lew Rothman's decades of blending expertise.

name: Ferio Tego Affinity Toro
description: The Ferio Tego Affinity Toro extends the Affinity line's milder Connecticut character over a Dominican core, ideal for those seeking a refined, smooth smoke with almond, cream, and cedar notes.

name: Ferio Tego Magnum Opus Toro
description: Ferio Tego's Magnum Opus Toro is the brand's most complex offering — a multi-country blend under a Nicaraguan Habano wrapper delivering dark chocolate, leather, and pepper in medium-full strength.

name: Ferio Tego Toro de Fuego Robusto
description: Ferio Tego Toro de Fuego Robusto uses a silky dark San Andrés maduro wrapper over Dominican tobaccos, producing a medium-full smoke with dark chocolate, earth, and leather in a compact, flavorful format.

name: Viaje Circa Robusto
description: Viaje Circa Robusto from Andre Farkas is a full-flavored Nicaraguan blend wrapped in Ecuadorian Habano — a medium-full smoke with leather, cedar, and pepper complexity that showcases Viaje's consistent boutique quality.

name: Viaje Skull and Bones Robusto
description: The Viaje Skull and Bones Robusto is a full-bodied Nicaraguan blend known for its intense pepper, leather, and dark chocolate — Andre Farkas's boldest expression, consistently drawing high praise from enthusiasts.

name: Viaje WLP Robusto
description: The Viaje WLP (White Label Project) Robusto is a consistently-praised Nicaraguan blend from Andre Farkas, offering rich leather, pepper, and cedar in a medium-full body that has become one of the boutique brand's most sought-after lines.

name: Viaje Exclusivo Florida Robusto
description: The Viaje Exclusivo Florida Robusto is a store-exclusive expression from Andre Farkas with an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper over full Nicaraguan filler — complex leather, cedar, and pepper in classic Viaje fashion.

name: Viaje Honey and Money Toro
description: Viaje Honey and Money Toro is the brand's sweeter, milder Connecticut-wrapped offering, bringing honey and cream character over a smooth Nicaraguan Jalapa core — a departure from Viaje's typically bold profile.

name: ACE Prime Lucía Robusto
description: The ACE Prime Lucía Robusto from Luciano Meirelles features an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper over a premium Nicaraguan core, delivering a refined medium-full smoke with cedar, leather, and coffee complexity.

name: ACE Prime Lucía Toro
description: The ACE Prime Lucía Toro is the flagship format of the Lucía line — Luciano Meirelles's benchmark expression earning critical acclaim for its perfectly balanced Ecuadorian Habano wrapper and complex Nicaraguan core.

name: ACE Prime Muestra de Saka Nacatamale
description: Part of Steve Saka's collaboration with ACE Prime, the Nacatamale is a short, full-flavored Nicaraguan vitola featuring a Jalapa wrapper with earthy, leathery complexity and dried fruit sweetness in a compact smoke.

name: ACE Prime Muestra de Saka Mionca
description: The Muestra de Saka Mionca showcases tobacco from Nicaragua's volcanic Ometepe island — a truly unique wrapper producing mineral-tinged earth, leather, and dark chocolate complexity in this collaboration between Steve Saka and Luciano Meirelles.

name: ACE Prime Mona & Lisa Corona
description: The ACE Prime Mona & Lisa Corona is a Dominican-forward expression with a Cibao Valley Habano wrapper delivering cedar, almond, and light spice in a refined medium-strength smoke — Luciano Meirelles showcasing Dominican terroir.

name: ACE Prime Mona & Lisa Toro
description: The Mona & Lisa Toro from ACE Prime allows more time for the Dominican Habano wrapper to develop, yielding refined cedar and dried fruit notes with cocoa and leather in a well-balanced medium-strength package.

name: Esteban Carreras Chupacabra
description: The Esteban Carreras Chupacabra is a medium-full Nicaraguan toro under the ACE Prime umbrella — an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper over bold Estelí filler delivers classic leather, pepper, and cedar complexity.

name: Esteban Carreras Red Robusto
description: Esteban Carreras Red Robusto, part of the ACE Prime family, is a Connecticut-wrapped Nicaraguan that offers a smooth, approachable medium-strength smoke with cream, almond, and cedar for those seeking refined mildness.

name: Tatuaje Arsenal Belicoso
description: The Tatuaje Arsenal Belicoso takes the bold Nicaraguan Habano blend and adds the torpedo head's concentrated flavors — a fuller, more complex version of the Arsenal line with dark chocolate and spice that builds throughout.

name: Kristoff GC Natural Robusto
description: The Kristoff GC Natural Robusto is the gateway into the GC lineup — an Ecuadorian natural wrapper over Honduran-Nicaraguan tobaccos producing a smooth, medium-strength smoke with cedar, nuts, and light honey.

name: Ezra Zion Encore Robusto
description: The Ezra Zion Encore Robusto is a San Andrés maduro-wrapped expression from the Texas boutique brand that showcases rich dark chocolate and molasses sweetness over a full Honduran-Nicaraguan core.

name: HVC 4 You Robusto
description: HVC 4 You Robusto is Hamlet Paredes's more accessible Nicaraguan line, using an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper to deliver balanced cedar, leather, and coffee at medium strength — ideal for those discovering boutique Nicaraguan cigars.

name: Viaje Oro Reserva Robusto
description: Viaje Oro Reserva Robusto is a lighter, more refined offering from Andre Farkas featuring a Colorado-colored Ecuadorian Habano wrapper — a medium-strength expression of cedar, cream, and cocoa that shows a different side of Viaje.

name: ACE Prime Fiat Lux Toro
description: The ACE Prime Fiat Lux Toro extends the critically acclaimed Fiat Lux line into the toro format — Luciano Meirelles's Ecuadorian Habano wrapper over Estelí filler delivers exceptional leather, dark chocolate, and pepper complexity.

name: Ferio Tego Generosidad Gran Toro
description: Ferio Tego Generosidad Gran Toro is the oversized vitola of the Generosidad line, with the extra ring gauge allowing even more complexity from the Ecuadorian Habano wrapper and Dominican-Nicaraguan blend — cedar, leather, and cocoa in a leisurely 75-minute smoke.

name: Tatuaje Verocu No. 4
description: Tatuaje Verocu No. 4 is a Habano-wrapped Nicaraguan robusto from Pete Johnson's Verocu line, offering a bold, medium-full smoke with leather, pepper, and coffee that pays homage to classic Cuban construction.

name: Ezra Zion Commencement Toro
description: The Ezra Zion Commencement Toro is named for the brand's spirit of beginning — a medium-strength Ecuadorian Habano toro over Honduran tobaccos, offering cedar, leather, and nuts for all-day smoking enjoyment.

name: HVC Cerro Natural Robusto
description: HVC Cerro Natural Robusto from Hamlet Paredes features an Ecuadorian Habano wrapper over Jalapa Nicaraguan tobaccos, delivering a medium-full natural smoke with cedar, coffee, and pepper in a well-balanced package.

name: Viaje Exclusivo Nicaragua Toro
description: The Viaje Exclusivo Nicaragua Toro is an extension of Andre Farkas's classic Exclusivo blend into the toro format, providing extra time for the Ecuadorian Habano wrapper to develop leather, cedar, and pepper complexity.
